NTC OF MTNA ND MTN FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, CHUN YI WANG, GUANG QI HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2008 IN 206, PLAINTIFF CHUN LI AND GUANG WANT'S MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). NO OPPOSITION FILED. JURY TRIAL IS SET FOR 12/15/08 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: A.J. ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR #12365 (D206)
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-26-2008 - DISMISSAL ON FILE. (MELLON-514)
